purpose: Check GitHub CI status for a PR and optionally report the result to a managed goal. No agent.

goal.description: Managed goal id to report CI evidence to.

evidence.description: Evidence key to set on the goal. Default ciGreen.

timeout-seconds.description: Maximum time to wait for pending checks before reporting not-green. Default 0.

poll-seconds.description: Seconds between CI polls while waiting. Default 30.

success: ci-check completes and returns a valid canonical result
failure: ci-check cannot return a valid canonical result
